rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work (ReAct) and articulates the delta (role-typed message passing with workspace checkpointing), but does not map against a set of 3-5 works.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim ('deployment-ready').
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested (missing R1.2, R1.6).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (overclaiming 'deployment-readiness').
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
